name: ai-suggestion-card
title: AI Suggestion Card
description: Suggested next action with icon, rationale, source count, and a single activation target.

props.name: title
props.description: Required. What the suggestion will do.

props.name: rationale
props.description: Why it is being suggested. One line, caller-authored.

props.name: sourceCount
props.description: How many context items the suggestion would read.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Fires on activation. The whole card is one button.

clinicalNotes: Never label a generated suggestion "recommended", "advised", or "recommended care" unless your product is passing through approved clinical decision-support provenance — a suggestion surfaced by a language model and one produced by a validated CDS rule look identical in a card, and only one of them carries clinical weight. Keep the rationale factual about the product's state ("no summary has been filed") rather than about the patient's clinical need. The whole card is a single button so there is exactly one activation target: a card with an ambiguous hit area is how a clinician fires an action they did not intend.
notes: Reuses cardVariants (interactive) on a native button, so hover/lift/focus behaviour matches the rest of the catalog without nesting interactive elements.
